subcodes.first_line: O thou who circlest round the Throne! O Muhammad-Qablí-'Alí! O thou who hast migrated in the path of God! Thy letter [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها الطائف حول العرش یا محمد قبل علی یا ایها المهاجر فی سبیل الله مکتوب
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @Word of God and human limitations, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
